title: centaurea bolivaris
intro: Centaurea bolivaris is a plant species, also known as Cornflower, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Centaurea bolivaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried flowers that can be used in capsules or added to food products.
